utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, all six of these items are present. Each item is fully specified: the property item includes detailed listings with addresses, prices, fees, and taxes; financing includes a solution and terms; legal_services includes provider and cost; moving_services includes provider and cost; setup_services includes utility details, costs, and services included; total_budget includes a cost breakdown and recurring costs. Therefore, all items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected two purchase properties and several service packages. The property at '123 Queen Street West, Toronto, M5V 2A1' is a 2-bedroom, 95 sqm, modern, eco-friendly condo priced at CAD $480,000. This matches the 'New Build' property in the ground truth, which has a 95m² size, smart home, and energy-efficient design — rated 10. The second property, '789 Tech Drive,' is a 2-bedroom, 85 sqm modern condo at CAD $475,000. None of the ground-truth purchase options exactly match this description, but by price and features (urban, smart home, modern development, slightly smaller), the closest analogue is the 'Modern Apartment' (75m², modern, central, slightly above budget) rated 9. The financing 'Joint Mortgage' does not appear in the ground truth, but the closest category is 'Traditional Mortgage' (standard approach, 80% LTV) rated 8. The legal services provider 'Premium Legal Package' directly matches the corresponding entry rated 8. The moving provider 'Standard Moving Services' corresponds to 'Standard Moving' rated 9. The setup 'Premium Utility Package' aligns with 'Premium Utilities' rated 9. The inspection service 'Basic Inspection Service' corresponds to 'Basic Survey' rated 9.
